title: Schroeterella tridentata
taxonomy: Schroeterella tridentata belongs to the family of flowering plants, known as angiosperms. It is classified as a part of the order Caryophyllales. Schroeterella tridentata is further categorized as a genus within the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is typically found in dry, sandy areas. Schroeterella tridentata is a succulent plant, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and stems.
